# ODI: Level of Abstraction

- Map at the client level (client as job executor), NOT at the solution provider level
- Client-level mapping targets platform opportunities (what the client is trying to accomplish)
- Solution-level mapping targets optimization of existing offerings (what the provider delivers today)
- The gap between what SMEs describe and what clients need is where strategic insight lives
- When SME input describes solution-level tasks, translate upward to the client's functional job before writing outcomes
